spec_match.rationale: Every token is a single if(media(prefers-color-scheme: dark)) declaration — exactly the spec dark-mode use case.

interactive.rationale: Buttons drive force-light / force-dark / system / token inspection.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Index promises a 10-token system with inventory table; page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't show contrast verification of generated pairs or the missing-fallback case.

references.rationale: Page has NO references or see-also section.

design_system.rationale: Page defines ten raw-hex tokens instead of design system variables. CLAUDE.md section 5 disallows this.

openQuestions.title: Show contrast scores per pair
openQuestions.detail: Add a contrast column to the token inventory with WCAG AA pass/fail.

openQuestions.title: Wrap raw hex in :root custom properties
openQuestions.detail: Wrap raw values in :root { --demo-* : ... } at the top instead of scattering hex.

summary: Comprehensive 10-token dark mode system; skips references block and contrast verification.
